title: OR in subselect causes the server to crash with segmentation fault
poc: CREATE TABLE b (a integer, b integer);
SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM b where a.a=b.a and (b.b=1 or b.b=2)) FROM a;
SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM b where a.a=b.a and (b.b<=1 or b.b>=2)) FROM a;
key_bug_features: OR in subselect causes segmentation fault
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id integer PRIMARY KEY, name varchar(50), age integer);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id integer PRIMARY KEY, user_id integer, amount decimal(10, 2), status varchar(20));
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30), (2, 'Bob', 25);
INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, amount, status) VALUES (1, 1, 100.00, 'completed'), (2, 2, 150.50, 'pending');
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.user_id = u.id AND (o.status = 'completed' OR o.amount > 100)) FROM users u;
